description: Same deterministic tree as IDX-D-rfc9110, plus a REAL gpt-4o summary for every node (--summary-token-threshold 0) and a doc description. The summarized twin for the RFC summary test (reports/design-rfc-summary-test.md). Differs from IDX-D-rfc9110 ONLY in summaries.

source.conversion: stdlib html.parser HTML->Markdown (h1-6 -> heading depth; <nav> ToC skipped). TODO: formalize into scripts/.

build.note: first attempt (run 20260715T043946Z) produced HOLLOW empty summaries due to OpenAI quota exhaustion; that output was discarded, not curated.
